Off Calendar May-21-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for Prove- Up for a Request for Default Judgment against Defendant Park Life Designs, LLC.

Dept.505: Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Deputy Jones and Deputy Belen; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:43:22 a.m and concluding at 9:58:49 a.m. (D505)

Laralei Paras, Esq. representing and appearing for Plaintiff Center for Advanced Public Awareness via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Park Life Designs, LLC. not appearing.

Complaint was filed Nov-16-2022.
Proof by Mail and Acknowledgment Receipt filed as to Defendant Park Life Designs, LLC filed Jan-10-2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Park Life Designs, LLC on Feb-28-2024.
Notice and Motion for Default Judgment filed Mar-18-2025.

Counsel provides a summary to the court.
Plaintiff Ramon is examined and testifies.
Plantiff Jennifer is examined and testifies.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants:

Damages $28,850.99
Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
Other $0
Total Judgment $28,850.99

Proposed judgment as amended is signed and filed by the Court.
